# Index — decisions
<!-- GENERATED by kb-render.sh — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->

- [Correlation store keys on company_id (int), durable across restarts](./correlation-store-keys-on-company-id.md) — `decision` — The session→task correlation store anchors on integer company_id and survives restarts, so parked tasks are re-armed after a redeploy
- [Engine workflow name is Namespace(company, definition name)](./engine-workflow-name-is-namespaced-def-name.md) — `decision` — Publish registers a definition under its PS name (company-namespaced), not the conductor_json's internal name; start resolves the same name
- [Park-style task defs register with retryCount:0](./park-style-taskdefs-need-retrycount-zero.md) — `decision` — Custom park-style worker task defs default to retryCount:0 so an engine retry can't re-fire a settled park and wedge the workflow
- [Status reads are DB-direct; no dependency on ps-api](./ps-workflow-reads-db-direct-no-ps-api.md) — `decision` — ps-workflow reads runtime/session status straight from the shared platform DB and mutates via orchestrator — it never calls ps-api
- [Engine-executed system tasks carry no _ps/tenant context field](./system-tasks-carry-no-tenant-context.md) — `decision` — System tasks (HTTP/WAIT/INLINE/JSON_JQ_TRANSFORM/SET_VARIABLE) run in the engine with no worker, so they declare no company/user context field; isolation is service-layer
- [Mutating nodes must carry _ps.user_uuid](./workflow-nodes-need-user-uuid-for-orchestrator-calls.md) — `decision` — Any node that mutates via orchestrator must be authored with _ps.user_uuid or the call is rejected 401
